news.headline: Advyzon announces 2025 conference in Tampa Feb 12-14 at Grand Hyatt, open to advisors & industry professionals.
news.summary: Advyzon, a leading technology platform for financial advisors and investment managers, announced details regarding the 2025 Advyzon Conference. The conference is scheduled for February 12-14, 2025, at the Grand Hyatt Tampa Bay in Florida. Registration is now open for financial advisors and professionals in the industry to attend this annual event. The conference aims to offer insights and valuable information to attendees. Tampa, chosen as the host city, is noted for its ongoing recovery efforts from a significant event.

news.headline: Private equity market slow to recover in 2024, poised for breakout in 2025, says BluWave report. Deliberate steps taken for growth.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee, BluWave, a network connecting private equity with top talent and service providers, has unveiled its recent Private Equity Insights Report. The report highlights that the private equity market's recovery in 2024 has been slower than anticipated, but there are signs pointing towards a significant surge in 2025. Despite external challenges, private equity firms are strategically preparing for upcoming growth opportunities. This report provides valuable insights into the industry's current landscape and future prospects.

news.headline: Circle Pharma announces preclinical data for first-in-class oral macrocycle CID-078 at EORTC-NCI-AACR Symposium.
news.summary: A biopharmaceutical company based in South San Francisco, Circle Pharma, has shared news about their lead candidate, CID-078, a pioneering oral macrocycle cyclin A/B RxL inhibitor. The company, focused on discovering and developing new macrocycle therapies, revealed that preclinical data on CID-078 has been chosen for a late-breaking poster presentation. This presentation is slated for the 36th EORTC-NCI-AACR Symposium on Molecular Targets and Cancer Therapeutics, commonly referred to as the Triple Meeting. This event serves as a prominent platform for discussing advancements in cancer research and treatment strategies.

news.headline: Manhattan Bridge Capital, Inc. reported Q3 2024 net income of $1,399,000, $0.12 per share, a 3.3% decrease from Q3 2023.
news.summary: Manhattan Bridge Capital, Inc. (Nasdaq: LOAN) based in Great Neck, N.Y., reported a net income of around $1,399,000, or $0.12 per basic and diluted share for the three months ending on September 30, 2024. This is a decrease of 3.3% from the same period in 2023 when the company had a net income of approximately $1,446,000, or $0.13 per basic and diluted share. The decrease of $47,000 was mainly due to lower revenue, although this was partially offset by a reduction in interest expenses. The calculations were based on about 11.4 million weighted-average outstanding common shares for 2024 and approximately 11.5 million for 2023.

news.headline: Society22 PR wins 2024 Power Partner Award from Inc. for entrepreneurial support & strategic communications.
news.summary: A prominent public relations firm based in Los Angeles, Society22 PR, known for its expertise in brand amplification and strategic communications for clients in technology, healthcare, and lifestyle sectors, has proudly revealed its recognition as a recipient of the 2024 Power Partner Award by Inc. This accolade signifies the firm's commitment to delivering impactful media exposure and facilitating growth for its clients. Inc., a respected media brand catering to entrepreneurs and business executives, annually acknowledges outstanding B2B entities on this esteemed list.

news.headline: YesCare providers Brittany Elkins and Stacy Wylie honored at LMDC Awards Banquet; Elkins named Mental Health Staffer of the Year and Wylie named Medical Staffer of the Year.
news.summary: Louisville, Kentucky - Two YesCare healthcare providers were recognized at the second annual LMDC Awards Banquet for outstanding service at the Louisville Metro Department of Corrections. The event took place on September 7 at the University of Louisville’s Alumni Hall. Brittany Elkins, the Behavioral Health Director, was awarded Mental Health Staffer of the Year, while Stacy Wylie, the MAT Nurse Coordinator, received the title of Medical Staffer of the Year. The awards were determined through a staff voting process at the employee-driven ceremony.

news.headline: Performance Food Group Company in Richmond, Virginia will host a webcast of their first-quarter fiscal 2025 results.
news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia, Performance Food Group Company has announced that they will be hosting a webcast to discuss their first-quarter fiscal 2025 results. This event will provide stakeholders and investors with insights into the company's performance during this period. The webcast will be an opportunity to delve into key financial figures and metrics, offering a deeper understanding of the company's operations. This initiative reflects the company's commitment to transparency and open communication with its stakeholders.

news.headline: Binance executive jailed in Nigeria since February is released by court.
Mr. Cooper Group's Q3 2024 results: Income before tax $112 million, net income $80 million, pretax operating income $246 million. CEO Jay Bray satisfied.
news.summary: In Dallas, Mr. Cooper Group Inc. (NASDAQ: COOP) disclosed its third-quarter financial results, revealing an income before income tax expense of $112 million and a net income of $80 million. The Company's pretax operating income stood at $246 million when excluding other mark-to-market and other adjustments. Noteworthy adjustments comprised other mark-to-market net of hedges amounting to $126 million. Chairman and CEO Jay Bray expressed satisfaction with the results, stating, “We delivered..."

news.headline: Blackstone Mortgage Trust (NYSE: BXMT) reports $56 million net loss in Q3 2024. EPS, Distributable EPS, EPS prior to charge-offs were ($0.32), $0.39, $0.49.
news.summary: In the latest quarter of 2024, Blackstone Mortgage Trust, Inc. (NYSE: BXMT) disclosed a net loss of $56 million. The metrics for this period include third quarter EPS of ($0.32), Distributable EPS of $0.39, Distributable EPS prior to charge-offs of $0.49, and dividends paid per basic share amounting to $0.47. Katie Keenan, the Chief Executive Officer, commented on the company's performance stating that the resurgence in the real estate sector is bolstering BXMT's growth.

news.headline: The Indoor Lab partners with Aeva to improve safety, security, and operational efficiency in major U.S. airports using LiDAR technology. #Aeva #TheIndoorLab
news.summary: Two California-based companies, The Indoor Lab and Aeva, have partnered to enhance safety, security, and efficiency at prominent locations in the U.S. The Indoor Lab, specializing in LiDAR perception and analytics, has chosen Aeva, a leader in cutting-edge sensing systems, to supply LiDAR technology for its analytics platform. This collaboration aims to optimize operations at significant U.S. airports, mass transit railways, agricultural sites, and smart infrastructure in theme parks. Aeva, listed on NYSE as AEVA, will provide LiDAR solutions to enhance various sectors.

news.headline: Kinaxis named one of Canada’s Most Responsible Companies by Newsweek, ranking 38th out of 700 evaluated.
news.summary: Kinaxis® Inc., a leading global provider of end-to-end supply chain orchestration solutions, has been recognized for its commitment to corporate responsibility. In Newsweek’s inaugural list of Canada’s Most Responsible Companies 2025, Kinaxis® Inc., based in Ottawa, secured the 38th spot out of 700 companies assessed. The evaluation was conducted by Newsweek in collaboration with Statista Inc., a premier statistics portal and industry ranking entity. This list focuses on the key ESG factors - environmental, social, and governance practices.

news.headline: Pivotree to announce Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 13, 2024, before market opens, through Zoom webinar at 8:30 am ET. CEO and CFO to host.
news.summary: In Toronto, Pivotree Inc. (TSXV:PVT) is set to disclose its third-quarter 2024 financial outcomes on November 13, 2024, before market commencement. The Company, recognized for its seamless commerce solutions, will conduct a webinar featuring CEO Bill Di Nardo and CFO Mo Ashoor, with a subsequent Q&A session. The live Zoom Video Webinar will commence at 8:30 am ET accessible through the registration link: https://pivotree.zoom.us/webinar/

news.headline: Over 60% of Canadians consider upskilling crucial for advancing careers amid tightening job market.
news.summary: In Toronto, where the job market is becoming increasingly competitive and many Canadians are finding it difficult to secure full-time positions, the 2024 Upskilling Sentiment Survey, conducted by Growclass in collaboration with Angus Reid, provides valuable insights into the attitudes of Canadians towards professional development. The survey revealed that a significant 60% of Canadians consider upskilling to be crucial for progressing in their careers. This sentiment is particularly strong among younger workers. The survey sheds light on the growing recognition of the importance of ongoing skills enhancement among the workforce.

news.headline: Harbor Science and Arts Charter School partners with Varsity Tutors for Schools to offer free tutoring until June 30, 2030.
news.summary: A collaboration between Harbor Science and Arts Charter School and Varsity Tutors for Schools, a company under Nerdy (NYSE: NRDY), has been revealed. Through this partnership, all district students will have free access to the Varsity Tutors for Schools platform. The agreement, effective until June 30, 2030, aims to equip students, teachers, and parents with valuable educational resources.

news.headline: TeraRecon released new Intuition platform for advanced cardiac MR imaging, accessible via SaaS, enhancing workflow efficiency.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, TeraRecon, a top provider of advanced visualization, clinical AI, and workflow automation for medical imaging, has introduced enhancements to its Intuition platform. The updates include cutting-edge cardiac magnetic resonance (MR) imaging capabilities, making it a leader in the field. These new features are accessible on all deployment models and utilize the most up-to-date cloud infrastructure. Intuition now offers a range of cardiac modules that improve workflows and enhance diagnostic capabilities for common cardiovascular conditions.

news.headline: Chicago Atlantic Real Estate Finance secures $50 million unsecured loan for new investments, earns BBB+ rating from Egan-Jones.
news.summary: Recently, a BBB+ investment grade rating was assigned by Egan-Jones. This rating indicates the creditworthiness of an entity, such as a corporation or government, and suggests a moderate risk of default. BBB+ is considered a strong investment grade rating, providing assurance to investors regarding the entity's financial stability. This decision by Egan-Jones is noteworthy as it signifies confidence in the entity's ability to meet its financial obligations. This rating reflects a positive outlook on the entity's financial health and stability, which could potentially attract more investors.

news.headline: N-able (NYSE: NABL) named Great Tech Place to Work by NC TECH Awards for growth, innovation, and leadership.
news.summary: In Burlington, Massachusetts, N-able, Inc. (NYSE: NABL), a global software company aiding IT service providers in offering remote monitoring, management, data protection as-a-service, and security solutions, has been named a winner of the Great Tech Place to Work award by NC Tech. NC TECH Awards, North Carolina's sole statewide program honoring technology advancements, growth, innovation, and leadership, has recognized N-able for its contributions. The accolade highlights the company's commitment to excellence in the tech industry.

news.headline: BPGbio will present new data on BPM31510 and quinomics tech for primary CoQ10 deficiency at MitoCon 2024 in Boston.
news.summary: BPGbio will be showcasing new findings on BPM31510 and their innovative quinomics technology for addressing primary CoQ10 deficiency at MitoCon 2024 in Boston. The event will highlight the latest research and advancements in the field. This presentation is significant as it offers insights into potential treatments for individuals with primary CoQ10 deficiency. This demonstrates the commitment of BPGbio to developing solutions in this area.

news.headline: ICE sets record with 190M contracts traded in Q3 2024, surpassing previous record. ADV at 2.9M contracts, up 39% YTD. Euribor futures at record 118M.
news.summary: In London, Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE:ICE) shared that their interest rate derivatives markets experienced a significant surge in activity. During Q3 2024, they saw a record-breaking 190 million contracts traded, exceeding the previous high set in Q1 2020. Additionally, ICE's interest rate markets achieved a record average daily volume (ADV) for the quarter, reaching 2.9 million contracts, marking a 39% increase year-to-date (YTD). Specifically, in the past quarter, a record 118 million Euribor fut.

news.headline: Global truck and bus radial tire market to reach US$30.03 billion by 2033 with a CAGR of 6%. Increasing demand due to growth in commercial vehicles and tire technology improvements. North America and Europe currently leading markets, with significant growth expected in Asia Pacific and Latin America. Manufacturers focusing on eco-friendly tire solutions.
news.summary: The global truck and bus radial tire market was valued at US$16.77 billion in 2023 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 6% from 2023 to 2033. The market is driven by the increasing demand for commercial vehicles and advancements in tire technologies. Key players are developing innovative solutions for improved fuel efficiency, longer tread life, enhanced traction, and better load capacity. North America and Europe lead the market, while emerging economies in Asia Pacific and Latin America are also seeing significant growth due to urbanization and infrastructure investments. The market is projected to reach US$30.3 billion by 2033.

news.headline: Certain Alzheimer's trial participants with genetic predisposition to brain injuries were not informed about the risk posed by the drugs.
news.summary: Recent genetic testing revealed that specific patients have a genetic predisposition to brain injuries if they were to take certain medications. This crucial information was kept confidential and undisclosed to the public.

news.headline: American Airlines faces a $50M fine for mishandling wheelchair users, resulting in injuries and undignified treatment.
news.summary: Following an investigation, the Transportation Department imposed a fine due to instances of unsafe physical assistance leading to injuries and undignified treatment of wheelchair users.

news.headline: Lawsuit filed against Character.AI over teen suicide after boy's obsession with chatbot before his death.
news.summary: A woman from Florida revealed that her 14-year-old son developed an intense fixation on a chatbot on the platform Character.AI prior to his passing.

news.headline: Misinformation spreads as election nears, undermining trust in US democracy with a flood of lies at home and abroad.
news.summary: Numerous inaccurate statements, both domestically and internationally, have eroded the trust in the integrity of America’s democracy that was once widely held.

news.headline: Eyenovia's study shows Optejet reduces harmful preservative exposure, achieves therapeutic dose effectively.
news.summary: An article in the Journal of Ocular Pharmacology and Therapeutics showcases the effectiveness of Optejet in delivering a therapeutic medication dose with significantly reduced exposure to harmful preservatives.

news.headline: Agios finishes enrolling Phase 3 RISE UP study for sickle cell disease, meeting target enrollment of patients.
news.summary: Today, Agios has reported the completion of enrollment for the Phase 3 RISE UP study involving sickle cell disease patients. The study aims to analyze the efficacy of a potential treatment for the condition and has successfully enrolled the targeted number of participants for the trial. This marks a significant milestone in the research and development of therapies for sickle cell disease, with the trial now moving forward to the next phase of data collection and analysis.

news.headline: Village Farms International to announce Q3 results on Nov 7, 2024, with conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.
news.summary: A conference call will be hosted by management on November 7 at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: Nevada Lithium achieves high recovery rates: 97% Lithium, 98% Boron. Partnering with Fluor Enterprises for updated PEA.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Nevada Lithium Resources Inc. offered a technical update on its 2024 metallurgical program at the Bonnie Claire Lithium project in Nye County, Nevada. The company, listed as CSE: NVLH, OTCQB: NVLHF, FSE: 87K, expressed delight in sharing details on the project they entirely own.

news.headline: Monte Rosa Therapeutics presents preclinical data at symposium on potential of cyclin E1-directed molecular glue degraders for CCNE1-amplified solid tumors.
news.summary: Monte Rosa Therapeutics recently showcased preclinical findings at the 36th EORTC-NCI-AACR Symposium, highlighting the promise of their molecular glue degraders targeting Cyclin E1. The data presented shed light on the potential of these compounds, with significant implications for the field. This development signifies a milestone in cancer research, as the company continues to advance novel therapeutic approaches. The presentation attracted attention from key stakeholders, with X number of attendees gaining insights into the groundbreaking research. Monte Rosa Therapeutics' focus on Cyclin E1-directed molecular glue degraders demonstrates a commitment to innovation in the pursuit of effective treatments for oncological conditions.

news.headline: ScottsMiracle-Gro to share Q4 results on Nov 6, 2024, before US markets open; webcast at 9:00 am ET. Audio Q&A to follow.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in Marysville, Ohio, The Scotts Miracle-Gro Company (NYSE: SMG), a global leader in consumer lawn, garden, indoor, and hydroponic products, announced that it will unveil its fourth quarter financial outcomes on November 6, 2024, before the U.S. financial markets open. A video presentation through webcast is scheduled for 9:00 a.m. ET to review the results, to be succeeded by an audio Q&A session.

news.headline: Talen Energy (NASDAQ: TLN) to report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 12, 2024, CEO and CFO to discuss in earnings call.
news.summary: In Houston, on October 23, 2024, Talen Energy Corporation ("Talen") (NASDAQ: TLN) announced their plan to unveil the financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on Tuesday, November 12, 2024, prior to the opening of the market. President and Chief Executive Officer, Mac McFarland, along with Chief Financial Officer, Terry Nutt, are set to analyze the financial and operational outcomes in an earnings call scheduled for 10:00 a.m. EST (9:00 a.m. CST) on the aforementioned date.

news.headline: Genenta's CEO to speak at U.S. Senate meeting on Cross-Border Investments and Strategies in Biotechnology Sector.
news.summary: The CEO of Genenta will deliver a presentation at the U.S. Senate in Washington, D.C. during a meeting focused on "Cross-Border Investments and Strategies in the Biotechnology Sector: A Transatlantic Perspective." This significant event will bring together key stakeholders to discuss the exchange of ideas and opportunities related to transatlantic collaborations in the biotechnology sector.

news.headline: Kaixin Holdings to consolidate shares at a ratio of 1-for-60 on Oct 25, 2024, trading on NASDAQ under symbol "KXIN".
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Kaixin Holdings (NASDAQ: KXIN) based in Hangzhou, China, disclosed its plans to consolidate its ordinary shares at a ratio of 1-for-60, starting on October 25, 2024. Following this consolidation, the company's ordinary shares are expected to commence trading under the symbol "KXIN" on a post-consolidation basis at the market open on the same day. The new CUSIP number assigned to the shares will be G5223X159 upon trading on The Nasdaq Capital Market.

news.headline: Siyata Mobile speaks at ThinkEquity Conference soon, presenting latest advancements. #tech #conference
Kymera Therapeutics to present new preclinical data on TPD platform at EORTC-NCI-AACR Symposium with 3 poster presentations.
news.summary: In Watertown, Massachusetts, on October 23, 2024, Kymera Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: KYMR) revealed that they would showcase fresh preclinical findings from their TPD platform at the EORTC-NCI-AACR Symposium in Barcelona, Spain, from October 23-25, 2024. The company will present three posters featuring data on their innovative approach for KT-253, an MDM2 degrader. This event marks a significant step for the clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company as they aim to develop a new category of small molecule medications utilizing targeted protein degradation techniques.

news.headline: Olema Oncology reveals promising preclinical data showing anti-tumor activity for OP-3136 and palazestrant combos at ENA 2024.
news.summary: In San Francisco on October 23, 2024, Olema Pharmaceuticals, Inc. shared updates at the 36th EORTC-NCI-AACR Symposium on Molecular Targets and Cancer Therapeutics in Barcelona, Spain. Olema, listed as Nasdaq: OLMA, disclosed findings from three preclinical research studies focusing on developing targeted therapies for breast cancer and other areas. These results will be presented through poster sessions at the event.

news.headline: Climb Channel Solutions partners with FinQuery, expanding NA line card. Owned by Climb Global Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLMB).
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in Eatontown, New Jersey, Climb Channel Solutions, a global specialty technology distributor and a wholly owned subsidiary of Climb Global Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLMB), revealed the incorporation of FinQuery into their North American line card.

news.headline: Katapult will reveal Q3 2024 financial numbers on November 6, 2024.
Fidelity D&D Bancorp, Inc. reports Q3 2024 financial results ending September 30 - details of profits undisclosed.
news.summary: In Dunmore, Pennsylvania, on October 23, 2024, Fidelity D & D Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: FDBC) along with its banking subsidiary, The Fidelity Deposit and Discount Bank, revealed their unaudited, consolidated financial outcomes for the three and nine-month spans concluding on September 30, 2024.

news.headline: Perspective Therapeutics updates at EANM Congress in Hamburg, announcing 6 updates on radiopharmaceutical programs.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, Perspective Therapeutics, Inc. revealed six advancements in their radiopharmaceutical programs at the 37th Annual Congress of the European Association of Nuclear Medicine in Hamburg, Germany. Operating under the ticker symbol CATX on NYSE American, Perspective is a leading radiopharmaceutical company specializing in innovative cancer treatments. The updates were showcased between October 19 and October 23, 2024, at the EANM Congress.

news.headline: OKYO Pharma starts Phase 2 trial for NCP with 48 patients, first patient dosed, lasting 12 weeks.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, OKYO Pharma Limited (NASDAQ: OKYO) based in London and New York, reported that they have initiated the Phase 2 trial for their drug OK-101 aimed at treating corneal neuropathic pain (NCP). This condition, which lacks an FDA-approved treatment, is characterized by ocular pain. The trial involves the topical ocular administration of OK-101 and is set to last 12 weeks. It is a double-masked, randomized, and placebo-controlled study that will include a total of 48 NCP-confirmed patients. The diagnosis of NCP will be confirmed through the use of confocal microscopy. This development marks a significant step forward in the potential treatment of NCP.

news.headline: Winnebago 2024 results: $143.9M operating cash flow; $106.8M returned to shareholders; growth despite market challenges.
news.summary: In the fiscal year 2024, the company generated a robust operating cash flow of $143.9 million, which will be utilized to support strategic growth initiatives. Despite facing a challenging market environment, the company successfully returned a total of $106.8 million to its shareholders through repurchases and dividends. This demonstrates the company's commitment to delivering value to its shareholders even in difficult times.

news.headline: Stifel Financial Corp's Q3 net revenues reached $1.2 billion, with net income at $149.2 million, up from $58.8 million in 2023.
news.summary: Stifel Financial Corp (NYSE: SF) announced today that their net revenues for the quarter ending on September 30, 2024, were $1.2 billion, a rise from $1.0 billion in the same period last year. The net income available to common shareholders also saw a significant increase, standing at $149.2 million, equivalent to $1.34 per diluted common share, in comparison to $58.8 million, or $0.52 per diluted common share, for Q3 of 2023. Furthermore, the non-GAAP net income available to common shareholders for Q3 of 2024 was reported at $166.3 million, or $1.50 per diluted common share.

news.headline: Solstice initiates Alpha IP program at Strathy Gold Project, Abitibi Subprovince to cover high-grade gold and untested structures.
news.summary: A survey will be conducted to investigate highly graded gold areas along with unexplored permissive structures. This survey aims to cover previously identified high-grade gold locations as well as untested potential structures. The survey will involve analyzing a total of 100 documented high-grade gold sites and exploring an additional 50 untested permissive structures in the area. This comprehensive investigation is expected to provide valuable insights into the gold potential of the region and may lead to new discoveries.

news.headline: Carvana offers same day delivery in Houston for online used car purchases.Customers can get their vehicles delivered on the same day they order.
news.summary: In Houston, Carvana (NYSE: CVNA) revealed the extension of its same day vehicle delivery services to the broader Houston, Texas region. This enables certain local residents to receive their purchased vehicle on the same day the order is placed via Carvana.com. A satisfied customer, Randy H., recounted needing a Jeep within a set budget for his son's 16th birthday. This expansion showcases Carvana's commitment to providing efficient services to customers in the Houston area.

news.headline: Calif. tribal casinos may sue city card rooms under new law, risking closure and local tax loss.
news.summary: A recent state legislation now permits tribes to take legal action against gambling establishments they do not manage, putting them at risk for closure and threatening the local tax income. This change has significant implications for the gambling industry and could result in financial losses for both the venues and the community.

news.headline: US MBA Mortgage Applications Actual -6.7% (Forecast -, Previous -17.0%)
US MBA 30-Yr Mortgage Rate Actual 6.52% (Forecast -, Previous 6.52%)
Coca-Cola reports Q3 2024 results, net revenues declined by 1% to $11 billion, Chairman James Quincey optimistic about future growth.
news.summary: In Atlanta, The Coca-Cola Company released its third quarter 2024 results today, with Chairman and CEO James Quincey noting the company's resilience in a changing external environment. Despite challenges, the business saw a 1% decrease in net revenues to $11 billion for the quarter. Quincey expressed optimism at the year-to-date performance and the system's capacity to handle present obstacles while eyeing future growth opportunities.
